answers: Writing a will: list assets, name beneficiaries, choose executor, sign with witnesses. Consult a lawyer for complex estates.
Everyone 18+ with any assets should have a will. Without one, the court decides how to distribute your property.
Tips: be specific, update regularly, store safely, tell executor where to find it, and consider a lawyer for large estates.
Will ki: amar mrittur pore amar sampotti ke pabe tar dastavej. Legally binding document.
